topic: India Prepares for Independence Day with National Flag Production
headline: INDIAN TEXTILE INDUSTRY REVIVES, BOOSTS NATIONAL FLAG PRODUCTION AS COUNTRY PREPARES FOR INDEPENDENCE DAY CELEBRATIONS
summary: India is preparing for Independence Day by ramping up production of the national flag. The Indian textile industry, which was born out of British rule, has a long history and was once a significant contributor to global demand. The industry has faced challenges, including a decline in global exports after Independence in 1947, but has slowly regained its footing. As the country approaches Independence Day, the production of national flags is underway, with the textile industry playing a key role.
